# Slide Image Prompts — Credentials & Access Platform

One section per slide that needs an image. The bracketed marker (shown below in escaped form) is the input to the Gemini→ImgBB pipeline (mirrors the blog convention from `scripts/imgbb-resolve-prompts.mjs`).

**Marker syntax** (use this literal form ONLY inside the per-slide sections below — never in the documentation prose):

> `\<!-- image_prompt:archive index=1 b64=Li4u -->
![...](https://i.ibb.co/DHfBZkK7/img-1.jpg)`  *(remove the backslash to make the script process it)*

**Pipeline:**

```
\<!-- image_prompt:archive index=2 b64=Li4u -->
![...](https://i.ibb.co/6cFz3rdD/img-2.jpg) → Gemini Nano Banana → ImgBB → ![alt](https://i.ibb.co/...) inline
```

**Run with:**

```bash
cd /Users/oren.sultan/blog
export GEMINI_IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIO=1:1   # square chalk accents for slides 2–29
node scripts/imgbb-resolve-prompts.mjs /Users/oren.sultan/projects/credentials-access-platform/slide-prompts.md
```

The script preserves each prompt in an `<!-- image_prompt:archive ... -->` HTML comment for future re-generation. To regenerate, delete the archive comment + image link and restore the original marker.

⚠️ **Gotcha:** the script's regex matches ANY `<!-- image_prompt:archive index=3 b64=Li4u -->
![...](https://i.ibb.co/qY85J046/img-3.jpg)` in the file, including inside code fences and prose. Always escape examples in docs (`\<!-- image_prompt:archive index=4 b64=Li4u -->
![...](https://i.ibb.co/YBKd8w8Y/img-4.jpg)`) so they aren't processed.

---
